description: Pins the ticket-attachment local validation incl. the API's documented extension allowlist (checked before any file read). The multipart success path is not pinnable: bodies carry random boundaries and no portable accepted-extension file exists on every machine; the transport itself is unit-tested per language.

cases.name: requires confirm before attaching
cases.expect_error: This creates a support ticket attachment. Set confirm=true to proceed.

cases.name: rejects non-positive ticket_id
cases.expect_error: ticket_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: rejects a relative file path
cases.expect_error: file must be a local, absolute path

cases.name: rejects a disallowed file extension
cases.expect_error: file must have an accepted extension: .gif, .jpg, .jpeg, .pjpg, .pjpeg, .tif, .tiff, .png, .pdf, or .txt
